sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.66: Protect enriched Booking.com bookings from ICS reimport and disable broad rebuild action for safety.
  • 1.8.8.65: Add Booking.com ICS rebuild action to clear staged feed rows and reimport with current room mapping.
  • 1.8.8.64: Make Booking.com ICS room staging fall back to CRM room IDs when sync/external room IDs are empty.
  • 1.8.8.63: Fix Booking.com ICS settings fatal by loading global $wpdb in settings page.
  • 1.8.8.62: Fix Booking.com ICS staged-night counting to increment only on successful inserts.
  • 1.8.8.61: Add Booking.com ICS room-feed importer with per-room URLs and auto-stage into sync bookings.
  • 1.8.8.60: Turn staged sync-booking migration into ongoing duplicate-safe CRM importer for future ICS automation.
  • 1.8.8.59: Add real MotoPress room-line import for ready matched rows using nightly room prices and taxes.
  • 1.8.8.58: Prefer dynamic CRM room-name matching over room-code fallback for MotoPress room mapping.
  • 1.8.8.57: Fallback MotoPress room mapping to local accommodation titles and CRM name/code matching.
